---

### 🧠 About

Full Stack Developer & Computer Engineering student who has designed, built, and shipped **3 production-grade AI-powered web apps** — combining scalable full-stack systems with practical LLM / RAG engineering. Open to fresher and internship opportunities.

- 🔭 Currently building AI-powered developer & productivity tools
- 🌱 Deepening expertise in RAG pipelines, vector search, and prompt engineering
- 🏆 SIH 2025 internal-round qualifier — built **Agrinova**, an AI crop-yield prediction platform
- 📫 Reach me at **bankarvishwas1@gmail.com**

### 🚀 Featured Projects

| Project | Stack | Highlight |
|---|---|---|
| **AI Interview Preparation Platform** | React · Node · LangChain · Gemini API | Resume/JD-gap analysis over 100+ resume–JD pairs |
| **Universal Document QA Assistant** | FastAPI · LangChain · Pinecone · GPT-4o | RAG + OCR search across 500+ documents |
| **MindBridge — AI Mental Health Platform** | React · FastAPI · LangChain · Pinecone | Real-time crisis detection, sub-200ms responses |
